'''Guy Domville Siner''' (born [[October 16]], [[1940s#1947|1947]]) is an American actor who provided voices for several ''Star Wars'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s. He is best known for playing [[Wikipedia:Lieutenant Hubert Gruber|Lieutenant Hubert Gruber]] in the television series ''[[Wikipedia:'Allo 'Allo!|'Allo 'Allo!]]''. He is also known to sci-fi fans for appearing in [[Wikipedia:Doctor Who|''Doctor Who'']] in the story [[Wikipedia:Genesis of the Daleks|''Genesis of the Daleks'']].

==Works==
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Guy Siner}}
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{C|Collector's CD-ROM}} – [[Imperial briefing officer|Briefing Officer]]
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' – Imperial Interface, Abridon Prisoner, General [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]]
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – General Veers, [[Trade Federation of Planets|Trade Federation]] med droid
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' – Imperial Officer 1, Imperial Worker 2
